entries.strengths: Effectively learns long-term temporal dependencies via gating.
entries.weaknesses: Large parameter footprint and sensitive hyperparameters, especially in sparse-data contexts.

entries.strengths: Captures long-range correlations efficiently with abundant data.
entries.weaknesses: Quadratic complexity in sequence length; memory-intensive.

entries.strengths: Employs sparse self-attention to enhance scalability for long sequences.
entries.weaknesses: Multi-layer stacks involve thousands of parameters and require large datasets.

entries.strengths: Provides accurate forecasting with interpretable decompositions into trend and seasonal components.
entries.weaknesses: High parameter count and data-hungry; may overfit in scenarios with limited data.

entries.strengths: Simple and straightforward to implement and train.
entries.weaknesses: Lacks specialized inductive biases for oscillatory or near-singular data.

entries.strengths: Excels at local approximations and can model a broad class of functions.
entries.weaknesses: Placement of kernel centers is non-trivial; struggles with sharp rational spikes or steep gradients.

entries.strengths: Sinusoidal activations capture smooth and high-frequency signals effectively.
entries.weaknesses: Requires large capacity to model abrupt spikes or extremely limited data; not explicitly designed for missing-data imputation.

entries.strengths: Uses dilated convolutions for efficient sequence modeling.
entries.weaknesses: Deeper architectures increase parameter counts and can be computationally slow.
